Meaning.En: The sale of goods and services to consumers in small quantities, typically in stores or online, as opposed to wholesale.
Meaning.Example: Many small businesses struggle to compete with large retail chains.

Situation.Vi: Cạnh tranh giữa cửa hàng nhỏ và chuỗi bán lẻ lớn.
Situation.En: Competition between small shops and large retail chains.

Situation.Vi: Chiến lược bán lẻ đa kênh (omnichannel retail strategy).
Situation.En: An omnichannel retail strategy that integrates online and in-store shopping.

Meaning.Vi: Bán lẻ; bán sỉ để rồi bán lại
Meaning.En: To sell goods or services directly to consumers for their personal use, usually through stores or online platforms.
Meaning.Example: The brand decided to retail its products directly through its own website.

Situation.Vi: Cửa hàng bán lẻ quần áo thời trang cho khách hàng cá nhân.
Situation.En: A clothing store retails fashion items directly to individual customers.

Situation.Vi: Nhà sản xuất tự bán lẻ sản phẩm thay vì qua đại lý.
Situation.En: The manufacturer retails its products directly instead of using intermediaries.
